description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, likely stucco or concrete, with large windows and a spacious layout. The property is surrounded by a rectangular fence and features a paved driveway leading to a garage. A swimming pool is visible in the backyard, and the house is set amidst a cluster of evergreen trees, providing privacy and a natural setting. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, and the main entryway is understated, blending seamlessly with the facade. The overall appearance is contemporary and functional, with outdoor amenities and landscaped surroundings.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, a backyard pool, and surrounded by evergreen trees. The design is geometric and contemporary, with a fenced yard and paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, driveway, garage, and a row of trees behind the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard pool, side entrance, and dense tree coverage on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view with the house partially obscured by trees, showing the back fence and some windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the pool, side yard, and more trees clustered to the left.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flush door, no porch, and a paved approach integrated into the facade
